title: derris amoena
intro: Derris amoena, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Derris amoena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Derris amoena can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
